analysis: The project contains multiple website versions (test-website, github-page, docs) with HTML, CSS, and JS files. The event.json specifies a black holes theme with animated objects, slides, and pages. The existing to-dos show incomplete CSS, HTML, and JS files that need to be completed for a black holes theme. The project appears to be building a website about black holes with cosmic/dark theme elements.
